# BDE Score

> Open-source multi-factor stock analysis covering 74 stocks across US, HK, and China A-share markets.

## Quick Start
curl https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?market=ALL

## Links
- [GitHub](https://github.com/hbhqq9/bde-score)
- [API Docs](https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/docs)
- [Dev.to](https://dev.to/hbhqq9/bde-score-open-source-multi-factor-stock-analysis-tool-covering-us-hk-a-share-markets-2p2j)
